products.title: Viva Small White Eggs, Turkey/India, 30 Pieces
products.description:
Product Description:

Presenting Viva White Eggs Small (30 Pieces), your high-quality source of daily protein and essential nutrients. These small white eggs come from healthy hens raised in a temperate environment, ensuring a toxin-free, nutritious batch for you and your family. Their perfectly smooth shells protect the nutrient-rich yolk and firm, high-quality egg white that ranks high on flavor. Use these versatile eggs to cook a plethora of enjoyable meals — from sunny-side-up eggs for a quick breakfast to more complex recipes, such as cakes or egg casseroles. All in all, these Viva White Eggs make for a splendid addition to any kitchen, serving great taste, nutrition, and convenience in one whole package. 

How To Use:

1. First, take the egg from the carton.
2. To cook, crack the shell over a bowl or pan, ensuring no shell pieces get into your food.
3. According to the specific recipe or preference, you may either use the whole egg, just the yolk, or egg white.
4. You can cook these eggs in various ways such as boiling, scrambling, poaching, or making an omelet or baking.

Storage Instructions:

1. Store the eggs in their original carton in a refrigerator at a constant temperature (below 40 °F is preferred).
2. Avoid washing eggs before storing to prevent the removal of the protective cuticle.
3. Place the eggs with the pointed end facing downwards.
4. For optimal freshness, consume the eggs within 3 weeks of purchase.

1. Chicken Eggs

products.title: Xhc Banana Shampoo 400Ml
products.description:
Product Description: 

Treat your hair to the indulgent care of the Xhc Banana Shampoo 400Ml. This splendid shampoo is formulated with nutrient-rich bananas to help nourish and moisturize your hair, leaving it feeling impeccably clean, smooth, and smelling delectably fresh. With its splendid cleansing properties, the Xhc Banana Shampoo is perfect for removing unwelcome oils and residues, while its unique special ingredients help soothe and restore health to your hair and scalp. This shampoo is also paraben-free, making it ideal for all hair types, including those that are sensitive.

How to Use:

1. Wet your hair thoroughly under warm running water.
2. Apply a generous amount of Xhc Banana Shampoo into your palms.
3. Massage the shampoo gently into your scalp and through your hair till it lathers.
4. Rinish thoroughly until there is no shampoo left in your hair.
5. Repeat the process if necessary.
6. For the best results, follow up with a suitable conditioner.

Storage Instructions:

1. Store the Xhc Banana Shampoo in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight.
2. Ensure that the lid is tightly closed after each use to maintain the product’s freshness and effectiveness.
3. Refrain from storing this product in a shower area where it may be consistently warm and moist, as this may alter the product’s consistency.
4. Keep the product out of reach from children.

Ingredients:

1. Aqua
2. Sodium Laureth Sulfate
3. Sodium Chloride
4. Cocamidopropyl Betaine
5. Glycerin
6. Musa Sapientum Fruit Extract (Banana Extract)
7. Hydrolyzed Wheat Protein
8. Polyquaternium-22
9. Glycol Distearate
10. Laureth-4.
11. PEG-7 Glyceryl Cocoate
12. Perfume
13. Citric Acid
14. Sodium Benzoate
15. Potassium Sorbate
16. Tetrasodium EDTA
17. Methylchloroisothiazolinone
18. Methylisothiazolinone.

How to Use:
1. Shake the bottle before opening to evenly distribute the brown sugar and tapioca pearls.

4. Always ensure to check the best-before date on the bottle before consuming.

Ingredients:

- Ensure your hands are clean to avoid any potential contamination of the tissues.
- Open the top of the Viva tissue box by carefully pulling the perforated area.
- Remove a tissue from the box. The next tissue will automatically follow and set itself up for the next use.
- Use the tissue as needed - for a cold, to remove makeup, or to wipe something clean. 
- Dispose of the used tissue properly in a trash bin. Do not reuse.

- Store the tissue boxes in a dry, cool place out of direct sunlight to prevent discoloration or degradation of quality.
- After removing a tissue, make sure the remaining part of the next tissue goes back into the box to avoid exposure to dust and dirt.
- If a box isn't going to be used for a while, re-close the perforated area to keep tissues clean and fresh.

products.title: Viva 2 Ply Facial Tissues, UAE, 5x150 Sheets
products.description:
Product Description: 
Indulge in the gentle, plush softness of Viva 2 Ply Facial Tissues. These premium tissues arrive in a set of five boxes, each containing 150 high-quality sheets providing exceptional strength and resilience due to their 2 ply formation. Lightweight yet durable, these tissues are made from sustainable sources, showing our commitment to the environment. Their convenient packaging makes them suitable for any room in your house - may it be your bathroom, living room or office.

How to Use:
- Ensure your hands are clean to avoid any potential contamination of the tissues.
- Open the top of the Viva tissue box by carefully pulling the perforated area.
- Remove a tissue from the box. The next tissue will automatically follow and set itself up for the next use.
- Use the tissue as needed - for a cold, to remove makeup, or to wipe something clean. 
- Dispose of the used tissue properly in a trash bin. Do not reuse.

Storage Instructions:
- Store the tissue boxes in a dry, cool place out of direct sunlight to prevent discoloration or degradation of quality.
- After removing a tissue, make sure the remaining part of the next tissue goes back into the box to avoid exposure to dust and dirt.
- If a box isn't going to be used for a while, re-close the perforated area to keep tissues clean and fresh. 

Materials:
- 100% Virgin Pulp: This provides a natural and soft texture to the tissues.
- These tissues are made sustainably - hence they're environmentally friendly.
- No perfumes, dyes, or lotions are used in manufacturing, making these tissues safe for sensitive skin.
